name: Cake: Bread: Cate's Pumpkin Nut Bread
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------TOPPING----------------------------------
2 tablespoons Melted butter
2 tablespoons Sugar
1/2 teaspoon Cinnamon
Sift dry ingredients into a large mixing bowl. Quickly add all remaining
ingredients. Mix only until dry ingredients are moist. Bake in 2 greased
9x5x3-inch pans in preheated 350-degree F. oven for 60 minutes. Cool for
5 minutes. Remove from pans and cool on wire racks. While warm, brush with
butter and sprinkle with cinnamon-sugar. Yield: Two loaves
